name: Firecrawl Web Data API
description: Web scraping and crawling API purpose-built for AI agents. Provides structured output (JSON, Markdown, HTML), screenshot extraction, and agent interaction capability. Trusted by 80,000+ companies. Offers MCP integration and CLI harness for immediate agent onboarding.
capabilities: Agent interaction (/interact endpoint) - click, type, extract
notes: Explicitly designed as 'Agent Ready' with dedicated onboarding flow. /interact endpoint allows agents to perform browser actions. Provides both oneshot harness (npx firecrawl-cli) and MCP server for immediate integration. Multi-format output (JSON, Markdown, HTML). Active development with new /interact feature.
